title: Module 1
content:
Definition of reliability– key elements; failure analysis – failure density –
failure rate – probability of failure - bathtub curve. Basic reliability
equations: Reliability in terms of – failure rate – failure density- relation
between reliability, failure density and hazard rate - Mean time to failure
(MTTF) – Integral equation of MTTF in terms of reliability

title: Module 2
content:
Hazard models – constant hazard model - linearly increasing hazard model -
Weibull model. Expressions for reliability, failure density, and probability of
failure of these models – problems

title: Module 3
content:
System reliability - reliability block diagrams (RBD), Components
connected in series – components connected in parallel – mixed
configuration – problems. Fault Tree Analysis (FTA) Symbols used in FTA,
Fault Tree Construction -Estimation of system reliability from Fault tree
problems.

title: Module 4
content:
Reliability improvement methods –Redundancy –unit redundancies –element
redundancies -problems. Simplification of design –parts derating –operating
environment; Cost of reliability –factors to be considered for optimizing the
reliability cost.
Reliability allocation -basic concepts. Reliability allocation for a series system
- Proportional to uniform failure rate method of reliability allocation (Other
methods need not be introduced)
